import io
import string
import list

fn find_index(_ tokens: List<String>, _ token: String, _ len: Int) -> Int
  mut i = 0
  mut result = -1
  while i < len
    if result == -1
      let t = match tokens.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        ""
      end
      if t == token
        result = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn update_at(_ counts: List<Int>, _ idx: Int, _ len: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < len
    let c = match counts.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if i == idx
      result = list.push(result, c + 1)
    else
      result = list.push(result, c)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
  let n = tokens.len()

  mut unique: List<String> = []
  mut counts: List<Int> = []
  mut unique_len = 0

  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      ""
    end

    let idx = find_index(unique, tok, unique_len)
    if idx == -1
      unique = list.push(unique, tok)
      counts = list.push(counts, 1)
      unique_len = unique_len + 1
    else
      counts = update_at(counts, idx, unique_len)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut best_idx = 0
  mut best_count = 0
  mut j = 0
  while j < unique_len
    let c = match counts.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if c > best_count
      best_count = c
      best_idx = j
    end
    j = j + 1
  end

  let best_token = match unique.get(best_idx)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    ""
  end

  print("top=#{best_token}=#{best_count}")
  Ok(())
end
